metadata.Scheme Name: HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund

text: Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Arun Agarwal is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,37,048 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 12 May 2026 is ₹46.97. The HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth is rated High risk.
